469.reason: [This condition may cause NullPointerException when reaching end of tokens, and the loop doesn't advance curpos properly, leading to infinite loop or incorrect parsing]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition may cause NullPointerException when there are no tokens after current position, and it incorrectly assumes MAINTK is always the second token of MainFuncDef without verifying the full 'int main()' pattern]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition may cause NullPointerException when there's no MAINTK or when token list is exhausted; also, it doesn't advance curpos so loop may never terminate]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This will cause NullPointerException if there's no MAINTK or if token list is too short; also fails to handle empty CompUnit correctly]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition assumes there is always a token after current position and that MAINTK appears in the second token, which may not hold if the file starts with main or is empty. Also, readAfterToken(1) can return null causing NullPointerException.]
